description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On August 30, 2024 at 12:14 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Alemany Boulevard at Ocean Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped for a red light in the center of three lanes on northbound Alemany Boulevard at the intersection with Ocean 
Avenue. While the Waymo AV remained stopped, an SUV traveling partially in the leftmost lane and partially in the same lane as the 
Waymo AV approached the Waymo AV from behind. The front passenger corner of the SUV then made contact with the rear driver side 
corner of the stopped Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both 
vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
